issues.description: Race condition: Global mutable state (generator, matcher) shared across concurrent requests
issues.fix: Use context managers or dependency injection to create per-request instances

issues.description: Memory leak: WorkflowIDGenerator.generated_ids list grows unbounded
issues.fix: Use WeakSet or don't track generated IDs, or implement TTL/cleanup

issues.description: Security: MD5 used for hashing (cryptographically broken)
Wrong project: Generated game (跳一跳) instead of Todo Web app
issues.fix: Regenerate with correct requirements - Flask backend + HTML/JS frontend for Todo app

comments: Found 4 critical issues: race conditions, memory leak, security vulnerability, wrong project
Cannot approve - generated code does not match requirements (Todo app)
Recommend restarting workflow with clearer requirements
